scripts.wasm:release: mkdir -p public && cd public && curl -fL -o hornvale_world.wasm https://github.com/hornvale/hornvale/releases/download/world-wasm-v1/hornvale_world.wasm && curl -fL https://github.com/hornvale/hornvale/releases/download/world-wasm-v1/hornvale_world.wasm.sha256 | shasum -a 256 -c -
